title: epiblepo #1914
definition:
1) to turn the eyes upon, to look upon, gaze upon
 2) to look up to, regard
 3) to have regard for, to regard
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to turn the eyes upon, to look upon, gaze upon
 2) to look up to, regard
 3) to have regard for, to regard

    NASB:  to look on (with favor):
